basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Forest Guard Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 708 Posts
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Forest Guard Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 708 vacancies across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates with 10TH Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-06-2026, and closes on 20-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Intermediate (10+2) from Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad, UP or equivalent recognised board

selection_process: Essential Qualification: Intermediate (10+2) examination passed from Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad, Uttar Pradesh or any equivalent examination recognised by the Government. Preferential Qualification (any one of the following): (One) Served in the Territorial Army for a minimum period of two years, OR (Two) Obtained "B" Certificate of National Cadet Corps (NCC), OR (Three) Obtained a certificate in Computer Application from a Central or State Government recognised institution, OR (Four) Represented the State in any sport/game.
how_to_apply: The application process for UPSSSC Forest Guard and Wildlife Guard Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Applications submitted through any other medium will not be accepted. Candidates must read the complete official notification carefully before filling out the application form. All steps of the application process can be completed in one sitting. The step-by-step process to apply online is given below.
seo_tags: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission Forest Guard Recruitment 2026
